description: main-window permissions (ARCHITECTURE.md §12: scoped to main). V3-P6 adds the four window-control IPC bindings (start-dragging / minimize / toggle-maximize / close) used by the opt-in custom titlebar; gated to the main window so the AI dialog stays on least-privilege. X6 adds updater:default — check/download/install are driven only from the main window's updater feature, so the AI dialog can't reach them.
